ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the test was conducted */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of test */,
  "test_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of testing */,
  "num_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "num_positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate of the tests */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_test_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_frequency_id") REFERENCES test_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the region's health department */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "is_rapid_test" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test is a rapid test */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "frequency_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the frequency (e.g., every 1 day, every 7 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test that produced the result */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was reported */,
  "test_taker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who took the test */,
  "test_conducted_at" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_taker_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_taker_id") REFERENCES test_takers ("test_taker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the case was reported */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of case */,
  "case_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the case (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "hospitalization_status" TEXT /* Hospitalization status of the case */,
  "case_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "case_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case is confirmed or suspected */,
  "case_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the case classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups the dashboard is shared with */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the dashboard was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table, map) */,
  "widget_position" TEXT /* Position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget that the data belongs to */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., testing_data, cases) */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_data_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES dashboard_widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type that the threshold applies to */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_takers" (
  "test_taker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test taker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the test taker */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the test taker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the test taker */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the test taker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_taker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high positivity rate, low testing frequency) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., CSV, API, database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time the data was last synced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
